title: Phone Login - Verify input field only accepts numeric characters
description: Tests that the keyboard is numeric and non-numeric characters cannot be entered.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Tap on the phone number input field.
2. Verify that a numeric keyboard is displayed.

expected_result: Only numeric digits (0-9) can be entered into the phone number field. Non-numeric input is ignored.
